prompt: A clean lifestyle portrait for a social-media cover image: a stylish young East Asian woman with long wavy black hair sits on a light beige sofa in a bright pastel living room, wearing a light blue and white tweed jacket and matching skirt with pearl buttons over a white top. She holds both hands up in a presentation pose, palms flat and facing upward, as if supporting a floating rectangular profile card. The card is a large white creator-profile panel positioned above her hands on the left side of the frame, with 1 circular black-and-white avatar portrait, 1 bold display name reading {argument name="profile name" default="Dan Koe"}, 1 handle line reading {argument name="profile handle" default="@DanKoeTalks"}, 1 stats line in Chinese showing subscriber and video counts, 1 short bio sentence reading {argument name="bio text" default="If you want harsh truths, read my letters... 更多"}, 1 website link line reading {argument name="website text" default="letters.thedankoe.com"} followed by Chinese text indicating one more link, and 1 dark rounded subscribe button labeled {argument name="button text" default="订阅"}. The woman faces the camera with a polished influencer aesthetic, her expression neutral and friendly. The composition is vertical, centered on her seated pose, with the profile card clearly legible and visually balanced over her hands. The background is softly blurred and elegant, with pale blue walls, geometric wall decor, a shelf with small plants, and soft natural daylight. High-end photography style, bright airy tones, Xiaohongshu cover design, minimal, premium, realistic skin and fabric texture, shallow depth of field.
translatedPrompt: 一张适用于社交媒体封面的干净生活方式肖像：一位留着黑色长波浪卷发的时尚东亚年轻女性坐在明亮柔和色调客厅的浅米色沙发上，身穿浅蓝色和白色粗花呢外套，搭配带有珍珠纽扣的同款半身裙，内搭白色上衣。她双手向上呈展示姿势，手掌平摊向上，仿佛在托举一张悬浮的矩形资料卡。卡片是一块位于她双手上方画面左侧的大型白色创作者资料面板，包含 1 个圆形黑白头像、1 行显示名称（内容为 {argument name="profile name" default="Dan Koe"}）、1 行账号名（内容为 {argument name="profile handle" default="@DanKoeTalks"}）、1 行显示订阅者和视频数量的中文数据统计、1 行简短个人简介（内容为 {argument name="bio text" default="If you want harsh truths, read my letters... 更多"}）、1 行网站链接（内容为 {argument name="website text" default="letters.thedankoe.com"}）及一行显示还有一个链接的中文文本，以及 1 个深色圆角订阅按钮（标签为 {argument name="button text" default="订阅"}）。女性面向镜头，展现出精致的网红审美，表情中性而友好。构图为竖版，以她的坐姿为中心，资料卡清晰易读，在双手上方视觉平衡。背景经过柔焦处理，优雅大方，墙面呈淡蓝色，配有几何墙面装饰和摆放小型植物的搁板，自然光柔和。高端摄影风格，明亮通透的色调，小红书封面设计，极简、高级，皮肤和织物纹理真实，浅景深效果。

breakdown.creativeCore: 网红手持悬浮个人资料卡：此提示词可生成一张精致的竖版生活方式封面图，展示一位时尚女性呈现悬浮创作者资料卡的效果，非常适合社交媒体缩略图和小红书风格的视频封面。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求可读；包含标注/说明
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
要求可读；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
